introSection: Looping Thunder was a steel roller coaster located at Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Looping Thunder was purchased new from Italy and opened on May 25, 1996.

The ride was closed on September 24, 2017 and subsequently dismantled. It was replaced by Adrenaline Peak, which opened the following year.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder harnesses.

fullText:
Looping Thunder was a steel roller coaster located at Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon, USA.

Looping Thunder was purchased new from Italy and opened on May 25, 1996.

The ride was closed on September 24, 2017 and subsequently dismantled. It was replaced by Adrenaline Peak, which opened the following year.



Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder harnesses.
